caption: A person's hand holds a smartphone on a tripod, recording a scene in what appears to be a medical simulation or clinic room. Two women are visible in the background; one wears a blue blazer and a stethoscope around her neck, while the other, partially seen from the side, wears a dark blazer. A third person, wearing a blue scrub top and a light blue surgical mask, stands further back. A light-colored table and a medical bed are present in the room. Overlaying the video frames are two identical QR codes and the white text "lbuchanan@som.umaryland.edu". At the top left of the first frame, the name "Walter Braxton, BA" is partially visible. Across the sequence, the handheld camera remains relatively steady, though there is a slight shift in the angle of the recording device and the position of the hand holding it.
